summary: Existing app with role-based auth and routing. Applying minimal admin recovery patch: new /admin/upgrade route (hidden, direct-URL only) and backend upgradeCurrentUserToAdmin function that overwrites caller's role to 'admin' when setup code NAMMA5600 is entered. No existing pages or logic modified.
architectural_notes: Existing backend has user/role storage (principal-to-role map) and auth flow — do not scaffold new app
/admin/upgrade is hidden (direct-URL only), no links or buttons elsewhere
upgradeCurrentUserToAdmin overwrites any existing role (customer/driver) to admin if code matches NAMMA5600
/admin/dashboard already exists; route guard requires role == admin — do not modify

existing_features.title: Add a new frontend route `/admin/upgrade` to the existing TanStack Router configuration in `frontend/src/App.tsx`. This route must require only that the user is logged in (no role restriction). The page must render: a title "Admin Upgrade", a text input labelled "Enter Admin Setup Code", and a button labelled "Upgrade to Admin". On button click, call the backend `upgradeCurrentUserToAdmin` function with the entered code. On success, redirect the user to `/admin/dashboard`. On failure, display the error message returned by the backend. This route must NOT be linked or referenced anywhere in the UI — it is accessible by direct URL only.

new_feature_requests.summary: Admin upgrade recovery patch: /admin/upgrade route + upgradeCurrentUserToAdmin backend function with code NAMMA5600

Add a new backend function `upgradeCurrentUserToAdmin(code : Text)` to the existing main actor. If `code == "NAMMA5600"`, overwrite the caller's stored role to `#admin` (or the equivalent AppRole variant used in the existing schema) in the existing user profile storage (the same HashMap/storage used by the current role getter/checker). Return a success result. If the code does not match, return an error result with message "Invalid admin code". This function must overwrite any existing role (customer, driver, or admin) without restriction.
